channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Dane on caring for her late husband, Eric Dane, and synthetic voices
item.description: The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.
item.content:encoded:
The wife of 'Grey's Anatomy' actor Eric Dane says caring for him gave her an "extra dose" of compassion for others.

(Image credit: Alberto E. Rodriguez / Getty Images for Chrysalis Butterfly Ball)
item.dc:creator: Juana Summers

item.title: It took a volunteer to get a small town senior center off the ground
item.description: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.content:encoded: When a small town with a lot of senior citizens had no community services for them, one volunteer stepped up and created a thriving program.
item.dc:creator: Laura Palmisano

item.title: Harrison Ford isn't retiring: 'I really wouldn't know what to do with myself'
item.description: Ford struggled to find his footing in Hollywood before being cast as Han Solo in Star Wars. Now 83, he plays a therapist in the Apple TV series Shrinking: "I really do love the work," he says.
item.content:encoded:
Ford struggled to find his footing in Hollywood before being cast as Han Solo in Star Wars. Now 83, he plays a therapist in the Apple TV series Shrinking: "I really do love the work," he says.

(Image credit: Valerie Macon)
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: The 2026 Oscars' best original song nominees, cruelly ranked
item.description: There are two clear frontrunners in this year's best original song race, either of which would be a worthy Oscar winner. Diane Warren is also nominated, for the 17th time.
item.content:encoded:
There are two clear frontrunners in this year's best original song race, either of which would be a worthy Oscar winner. Diane Warren is also nominated, for the 17th time.

(Image credit: Netflix)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: Marty Crunchwrap Supreme and more menu ideas for your 2026 Oscars party
item.description: You're inviting folks over to watch the Oscars, but you want to serve them a bill-of-fare that reflects this year's idiosyncratic slate of best picture nominees. We can help with that.
item.content:encoded:
You're inviting folks over to watch the Oscars, but you want to serve them a bill-of-fare that reflects this year's idiosyncratic slate of best picture nominees. We can help with that.

(Image credit: Abi Inman)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon

item.title: Over puppy yoga? Try it with snakes.
item.description: You've heard of yoga with kittens, and goats, and maybe even reindeer… but what about a bunch of pythons and one baby Columbian Common Boa named Mango?
item.content:encoded:
You've heard of yoga with kittens, and goats, and maybe even reindeer… but what about a bunch of pythons and one baby Columbian Common Boa named Mango?

(Image credit: Celeste Noche for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Academy of Motion Pictures CEO talks Oscars, audiences and scandals
item.description: Starting in 2029, the Oscars will be shown exclusively on YouTube. This announcement follows years of scandals and dwindling audiences for Hollywood's premiere awards show. NPR's A Martinez talks to Bill Kramer, the CEO of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts & Sciences.
item.content:encoded: Starting in 2029, the Oscars will be shown exclusively on YouTube. This announcement follows years of scandals and dwindling audiences for Hollywood's premiere awards show. NPR's A Martinez talks to Bill Kramer, the CEO of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts & Sciences.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: A woman witnessed a heroic act while suffering in an emergency room
item.description: On this week's "My Unsung Hero" from Hidden Brain, one woman says she witnessed a heroic act while suffering in an emergency room.
item.content:encoded: On this week's "My Unsung Hero" from Hidden Brain, one woman says she witnessed a heroic act while suffering in an emergency room.

item.title: Wheelchair curler Steve Emt's path from drunk driver to three-time Paralympian
item.description: Steve Emt and Laura Dwyer fell just short of the podium in the Paralympics' new mixed doubles wheelchair curling event. Emt remains the most decorated Paralympic curler in U.S. history.
item.content:encoded:
Steve Emt and Laura Dwyer fell just short of the podium in the Paralympics' new mixed doubles wheelchair curling event. Emt remains the most decorated Paralympic curler in U.S. history.

(Image credit: Maja Hitij)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: 'American Classic' is a hidden gem that gets even better as it goes
item.description: In this charming TV series, Kevin Kline plays a Shakespearean actor who retreats to his small hometown after a crisis, and gets engaged in an effort to save the local theater.
item.content:encoded:
In this charming TV series, Kevin Kline plays a Shakespearean actor who retreats to his small hometown after a crisis, and gets engaged in an effort to save the local theater.

(Image credit: David Giesbrecht)
item.dc:creator: David Bianculli
